description:
Parent epic: V3 E9: Memory and compaction

Source task 2/6 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Audit compaction modes, thresholding, prompt override, manual compaction, and
  provider-facing message trimming.

Epic closure criteria:
- memory and compaction have separate, crisp docs and tests
- compaction does not mutate the canonical transcript

comments.text: Audited compaction mode handling, threshold checks, prompt override validation/resolution, manual compaction, provider-facing message trimming, failure-open behavior, inspection, and existing tests. Current coverage already exercises auto/manual/off, below-threshold skips, prompt module/MFA/static overrides, manual session and pid paths, summarize failures, retained tails, tool-call boundary preservation, request transformer injection, trace/inspection/Kino consumers, and imported JSON/YAML round trips. Recorded the V3 public contract: compact/2 and inspect_compaction/2 stay; compaction may trim only provider-facing messages and never the canonical thread. Verified with mix format --check-formatted, mix compile --warnings-as-errors, mix test, mix docs --warnings-as-errors, mix doctor --raise, and git diff --check.

title: E9: Audit compaction modes, thresholding, prompt override, manual compaction, and p...
